_comment: autonomous-fleet Claude Code hooks template — opt-in 'strict mode'. Install: copy this file to .claude/settings.json (or merge into the existing hooks block). The Stop hook refuses session termination when no EVID / WT_CLEAN / e2e_verified / verify_summary / test_artifact / e2e_artifact evidence exists in the last 30min. See references/strict-mode.md for the full walkthrough.
_lineage: Hook contract follows Claude Code Stop-hook spec. Pattern adapted from claude-code-orchestra/.claude/hooks/stop-verify.sh and multi-llm-plugin-cc/plugins/llm/hooks/hooks.json. See /workspace/audit-work/borrowable-patterns-report.md #2.
